arts.ttl: How Hartson 'spoiled' a Celtic win at Hampden
arts.sum: John Hartson was a popular play at Celtic, but the striker was not always on the right side of the manager who signed him, Martin O'Neill.

arts.ttl: How Hartson 'spoiled' a Celtic Hampden win

arts.ttl: Adam Idah's Celtic status is affecting him as John Hartson poses transfer hindsight question
arts.sum: The champions spent £9.5million to bring Idah back permanently but Hartson says he 'hasn't hit the ground running'

arts.ttl: The Brendan Rodgers influence Celtic keeper Kasper Schmeichel can't get enough of as he hails perfect fit
arts.sum: On the decision to join Celtic in the summer, he added: “It was a very brief conversation because as soon as I spoke to Brendan and having worked with him at Leicester and knowing his style, knowing what he’s about, how he wants his teams to play, how he makes the club tick and how he wants things to be, it was quite easy. “Tactically, he knows exactly what he wants, he’s very clear in his message and for me I think that’s the most important thing through the years that I’ve learnt: when a manager can give you clarity that’s massive because it’s such a help to players when you have a clear message.”

arts.ttl: The Celtic Champions League legacy skipper wants to leave quietly and ditch whipping boys reputation

arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI v Atletico Madrid: Mitchel Bakker adds to growing injury list
